channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Geo News Issues Apology for Muharram Documentary, Faces Criticism
item.description: Geo News has faced widespread praise from political, social, and media figures for its formal apology regarding the 'Safar-e-Ishq' documentary aired on 10th Muharram. The broadcaster acknowledged its ...

item.title: Bonnie Tyler, iconic singer of 'Total Eclipse of the Heart,' passes away at 75
item.description: Bonnie Tyler, the British singer famous for her power ballad 'Total Eclipse of the Heart,' has died at age 75 after a prolonged illness. Her family confirmed her death in a statement shared on Instagr...

item.title: Former KDF Soldier Shares Harrowing Experience Fighting in Russian Military
item.description: Former Kenya Defence Forces (KDF) soldier Dishon Adam, who joined the Russian army in 2023, has shared a detailed account of his experiences fighting in the Russian military. After serving 10 years in...

item.title: Ebola outbreak in DRC is fastest-growing, kills 600 people
item.description: The Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) is escalating rapidly, with health authorities confirming 1,759 cases and 600 deaths since mid-May 2026. This marks the fastest-growing out...

item.title: England's Key Players Miss Training Amid Injuries and Suspensions Ahead of Norway Clash
item.description: Declan Rice, Marc Guehi, and Reece James have opted for individual training sessions instead of joining the rest of the England World Cup squad, as the team prepares for their quarterfinal match again...

item.title: Continuous Monitoring and Governance of Agents for Risk Management
item.description: The article emphasizes the critical need for continuous monitoring and operational review of agent governance to prevent stale or unmanaged environments. It explains that agent governance is an ongoin...

item.title: Ukraine strikes Russian fuel tankers amid escalating energy crisis
item.description: Ukraine has intensified its attacks on Russia's energy infrastructure, targeting fuel tankers and oil refineries in a bid to exacerbate nationwide gasoline shortages. Recent strikes in the Sea of Azov...

item.title: Senator Jinggoy Estrada Withdraws Impeachment Trial Participation Due to Legal Misstep
item.description: The Sandiganbayan Second Division granted Senator Jinggoy Estrada's motion to withdraw his request to attend the Senate impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, citing that he filed the case ...

item.title: Donald Trump Jr.'s Role at GrabAGun and Gun Regulation Implications
item.description: The article examines Donald Trump Jr.'s position as a spokesman for GrabAGun, an online retailer selling firearms, and his ownership stake in the company. Analyst Tom Boggioni criticizes this arrangem...

item.title: Dodgers to Visit White House in July to Celebrate 2025 World Series Championship
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers are set to visit the White House on July 23, 2026, to commemorate their 2025 World Series victory. This visit follows a tradition of hosting World Series champions, with previo...

item.title: Atif Zaman Gets Death Sentence for Mureed Abbas Murder; Seven Years in Weapons Case
item.description: An additional district and sessions court sentenced prime accused Atif Zaman to death on two counts related to the 2019 murder of anchorperson Mureed Abbas and his friend Khizer Hayat. The court also ...

item.title: Kenya Police Crack Down on Human Smuggling with 25 Arrests in Kisumu
item.description: The Kenya Police Service has intensified efforts to combat human smuggling by arresting 25 foreign nationals in Kisumu County. The operation, conducted by Kasagam Police Station officers, targeted ill...

item.title: Judge Condemns Justice Department for Violating Sealing Order in Press Conference
item.description: U.S. Magistrate Judge Laura McNally ruled that the Justice Department violated a federal sealing order by discussing a sealed case during a press conference led by Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche...

item.title: Ekurhuleni Officials Arrested in Corruption Probe
item.description: Four senior officials from the Ekurhuleni metropolitan municipality, including a former municipal manager and a suspended police department deputy chief, have been arrested as part of a corruption inv...

item.title: Smart packing tips for winter weekend getaways: layers and minimal shoes
item.description: The article provides practical advice on efficiently packing for a winter weekend trip, focusing on layering clothing and minimizing shoe options. Experts like flight attendants, stylists, and designe...

item.title: Kogi Teacher's Death After Assault by Student's Father Sparks Police Investigation
item.description: Maryam Usman, a 30-year-old primary school teacher in Kogi State, died after allegedly being assaulted by Abdullahi Ishaka, the father of one of her pupils. The incident occurred on June 18, 2026, at ...

item.title: Bonnie Tyler's Legacy: From Power Ballads to Global Pop Success
item.description: Bonnie Tyler's career spanned decades, marked by a unique trajectory that defied conventional music trends. Beginning in the mid-1970s with hits like 'Lost in France' and 'It’s a Heartache,' her early...

item.title: Zuleika Lopez's Senate Appearance and Typhoon Inday Remarks
item.description: Zuleika Lopez, chief of staff to Vice President Sara Duterte, made a surprise appearance at the Senate on July 9, 2026, a day after the impeachment court subpoenaed her for Duterte’s trial. During her...

item.title: Tragic accident claims lives of two women on NH-44 near Shamshabad
item.description: A tragic incident occurred on Thursday morning when an SUV, registered under Karnataka, collided with two women crossing National Highway 44 near the Satamrai bus stop in Shamshabad. The accident happ...

item.title: Mailula set to rejoin Mamelodi Sundowns after MLS exit
item.description: Cassius Mailula, the 25-year-old striker, is set to rejoin Mamelodi Sundowns after his stint with Toronto FC in Major League Soccer (MLS) ended. Mailula, who joined Sundowns in 2023 before moving to M...
